original: “You... you want me to leave?” [gooarmor.name] appears very concerned. “I mean, like, if you want your private space and stuff, I get it. Hm... maybe I can find a new friend?” With a final pout, she reforms herself into a blob and quietly slinks away from view.

original: “[pc.MisterMiss] Steele...” [gooarmor.name]’s faint voice hits your ear. “I don’t feel so good...” You sense the silvery mass flow around you as she morphs into a very familiar shape. Her hugging form weighs you down as her face comes into view. Instead of the bright visage you are used to seeing, a look of desperation takes its place. Small, gray bloblets detach from her body, dispersing into the open air and, bit by bit, the once happy goo girl is rapidly dissolving away in your arms. “I-I don’t wanna go... Please, I--...” And then silence. Nothing is left of your gray goo friend.
